params.note: Real fixtures exported from results/scenario_sweep/ and results/ablation_matrix/. Reward formula: utility = q − ν·f, PA_reward = (1 − λ_norm)·utility − λ_norm·c̃, λ_norm = sigmoid(α·burn_excess). Latency observed and logged per round but not part of reward.

ablation_legend.A4-noThompsonSampling: no_ts — greedy posterior mean instead of TS
